gallery.description: Upload any image and get a detailed AI prompt. Hover over a photo to reveal its prompt, then copy it with one click.
gallery.hoverHint: Hover over a photo to preview its AI-generated prompt

howItWorks.title: From image to prompt in seconds
howItWorks.description: Upload any photo, let our AI vision model analyze it, and get a detailed prompt you can paste into any AI image generator.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to upload any JPG, PNG, or WebP image up to 5 MB. Your image is processed securely and never stored.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our LLaVA vision model examines the subject, colors, mood, lighting, composition, and style of your image in seconds.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get a detailed, structured prompt ready to paste into Midjourney, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion, or any AI image generator.
howItWorks.step3Benefit2: Works with all major AI tools
howItWorks.step3Benefit3: Choose style presets to refine output

pricing.freeDesc: Try imagestudio with no commitment — perfect for exploring AI prompt generation.
pricing.proDesc: For creators who prompt daily — unlimited analyses with enhanced quality.
pricing.teamDesc: For studios and agencies — collaborate with shared galleries and API access.

about.title: About imagestudio
about.intro: imagestudio is a free, AI-powered tool that turns any image into a detailed, ready-to-use prompt for AI image generators like Midjourney, DALL·E, and Stable Diffusion.
about.whatWeDo: We use Cloudflare's LLaVA-1.5 vision model to analyze the content, style, colors, mood, and composition of your uploaded image, then synthesize that analysis into a detailed art prompt you can copy and paste directly into your favorite AI image tool.
about.tech2: Cloudflare Workers AI — LLaVA-1.5 vision model inference
about.contactText: Have a question or feedback? Get in touch.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What types of images can I upload?
faq.a1: You can upload JPG, PNG, or WebP files up to 5 MB. Most photos, illustrations, and digital art work well.
faq.q2: Is my image stored on your servers?
faq.a2: No. Images are sent directly to the AI model for analysis and are never stored or logged by imagestudio.
faq.q3: Which AI image generators work with the prompts?
faq.a3: The prompts are optimized for Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly, and similar tools.
faq.q4: What is the free plan limit?
faq.a4: Free users get 5 image analyses per month. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited analyses.
faq.q5: Can I choose a specific art style?
faq.a5: Yes! The Generator page includes a style selector (cinematic, anime, photorealistic, oil painting, etc.) that guides the AI output.
faq.q6: How accurate are the generated prompts?
faq.a6: Accuracy depends on the input image. Clear, well-lit photos with distinct subjects produce the best prompts. Abstract or low-resolution images may yield less precise results.
faq.a7: No account is required for your first 5 generations on the free plan. Sign up for an account to track your history and access Pro features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1: When you use imagestudio, we may collect your email address and profile information if you create an account. Images uploaded for analysis are processed in real time and are not stored on our servers.
privacy.section2: We use the information we collect to provide and improve the imagestudio service, communicate with you about your account, and send service-related notifications.
privacy.section3: We use Cloudflare Workers AI to process image analysis. Images are sent to Cloudflare for inference and are subject to Cloudflare's Privacy Policy.
privacy.section4: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section5: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1: By accessing and using imagestudio, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.section2: imagestudio provides AI-powered image-to-prompt generation. You upload an image, and the service returns a text prompt describing the image in a style suitable for AI image generators.
terms.section3: You are responsible for the images you upload. Do not upload images that contain illegal, harmful, or copyrighted content without authorization. You retain ownership of your uploaded images and generated prompts.
terms.section4: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or usefulness of any generated prompt. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.
terms.section5: Questions about these terms? Please contact us.
